column1: # Merchant mapping file — edit this file
#   raw_pattern  — substring matched case-insensitively against the raw merchant field
#   clean_name   — canonical name written into the transaction
#   sub_category — optional sub-category (leave blank if not needed)
#   priority     — higher number = checked first (use 10+ to override built-in defaults)
#   - raw_pattern is matched as a substring: "swiggy" matches "SWIGGY FOOD DELIVERY LTD"
#   - More specific patterns should have higher priority than general ones
#   - Re-running import is safe — existing rows are updated
